objective: Cycle 101 — C131: GLB emissive hover glow (map+bookshelf post-load) + createCandles factory pattern

bugs_fixed: C131/GLB-EMISSIVE-01 (MEDIUM): onMapGLBLoaded + onShelfGLBLoaded callbacks did not set emissive on GLB mesh. applyFlatShading() leaves emissive Color(0,0,0); applyHoverTo() check emissive.r/g/b>0 silently no-ops → hover glow broken for map + bookshelf after GLB loads. Fix: restore warm emissive tones (map: 0x3a2a10 matching procedural mapMat; shelf: 0x2a1a08 matching procedural shelfMat) in both callbacks.

C131/CANDLES-FACTORY-01 (LOW): createCandles(scene) called scene.add(group) internally — only factory not following return-group pattern. Same BUG-L-DOUBLE-ADD-01 class as createCauldron fix in C129b. Fix: remove scene param + internal scene.add; add scene.add(candleGroup) at call site.
audit_summary.c131_verdict: CLEAR — Emissive hover restored on 2 GLB zones. All 5 activatable zones now have full hover feedback (scale + toast + SFX + emissive glow) on both procedural and GLB paths.
c131_confirmations: MerlinLairScene.ts: onMapGLBLoaded emissive 0x3a2a10 + onShelfGLBLoaded emissive 0x2a1a08 — C131/GLB-EMISSIVE-01
MerlinLairScene.ts: createCandles() no scene param, scene.add(candleGroup) at call site — C131/CANDLES-FACTORY-01
